Not everyone wants to sit through five hours of my Hermes Agent Masterclass, so this is the fast track: zero to a working agent in about 10 minutes. I walk through the one-line install and quick-setup wizard, then connect messaging through the gateway — both Telegram and the new iMessage bridge via Photon, which works on Windows even if you don't have a Mac. From there I show how to give your agent a skill (just ask it to install one), where to find the web dashboard and desktop app, and how to switch models and use the built-in memory. Finally you'll set up your first Cron job — a daily sports + AI-news text to your phone — so you finish the video with a real, running agent.

Resources:
🔗 Hermes Agent: [https://github.com/NousResearch/herme...](https://www.youtube.com/redirect?event=video_description&redir_token=QUFFLUhqbmRUanBlUUluWXMta190bkFrQ21Hal9SdDkzZ3xBQ3Jtc0ttZUFwd0FCbzNIaVB1eFA2SjF2MEhyRFlBbHJEd3RkYS1vaEtwWmVGTDFqdkFEZGd5YURqejhiTlFRcHdwYTR6XzQ1SWFYUk9ZLW1hTVpULXNXRTh3UDBhelZzaHZLSm10WGluR2xuNTdRZGNkNkFVQQ&q=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2FNousResearch%2Fhermes-agent&v=BeWUUclCin0)
